summary: Iteration 30: Tested Team Members redesign (3x5 grid + org chart), account cleanup, QR archive/delete, and avatar upload. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified - Individual view with pagination, Team Structure with connector lines, Division Hierarchy with full org chart, profile detail overlay with avatar upload button, Jobs page with archive/delete functionality.
test_credentials: Owner: sadam.owner@slmco.local / SLMCo2026!, GM: ctyler.gm@slmco.local / SLMCo2026!, Account Managers: mmegan.accm@slmco.local, tdaniel.accm@slmco.local, Supervisor: hjohnny.super@slmco.local. OLD ACCOUNTS REMOVED: owner@fieldquality.local, gm@fieldquality.local
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Archive_Iter30 and TEST_Delete_Iter30 crew links during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 verified: (1) Team Members page redesigned with 3 views - Individual (3x5 grid with pagination), Team Structure (org chart with crew leaders and nested members), Division Hierarchy (full nested org chart from Owner to Crew Members). (2) Account cleanup - Brad S is now Production Manager (not GM), Megan M and Daniel T renamed, old accounts owner@fieldquality.local and gm@fieldquality.local DELETED. (3) QR archive - POST /api/crew-access-links/{id}/archive sets archived=true and archived_at timestamp, 30-day auto-delete runs on backend startup. (4) QR delete - DELETE /api/crew-access-links/{id} permanently removes link (owner role required). (5) Avatar upload - POST /api/team/profiles/{id}/avatar uploads to Supabase storage. Jobs page accessible via 'Alignment & QR' nav link for management role.

frontend_jobs_page.active_crew_links: PASS - 6 active links with QR codes
